description:
A command line interface for the Nitrokey FIDO2, Nitrokey Start, Nitrokey 3 and NetHSM.


This release adds support for the new features in NetHSM v4 (clustering, IPv6 config, backup format v1). Clustering support is still experimental.
What's Changed
- PIV: Add support for RSA 2048 private key import by @sosthene-nitrokey in #721
- Enable support for python 3.14 by @sosthene-nitrokey in #738
- Add support for NetHSM v4 and release v0.12.0 by @robin-nitrokey in #746
Full Changelog: v0.11.4...v0.12.0
